testcase.name: test_user_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 422 assert 422 in [200, 401] + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_live_features.py:78: in test_user_login assert response.status_code in [200, 401], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 422 E assert 422 in [200, 401] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Admin login failed: 422 assert 422 == 200 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_live_features.py:86: in test_admin_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: 422 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
